title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: Kimi K2.6 is a new LLM released by MoonShot AI designed for coding tasks and agent swarm applications. The release represents incremental improvement over K2.5, with enhanced capabilities for long-running tasks.
